message:
Expand benchmark coverage beyond buffer module (bd-313)

Add comprehensive benchmarks for:
- Color blending: creation, Porter-Duff blending, palette conversion, lerp
- Text buffer: TextBuffer ops, EditBuffer insertion/deletion/cursor/undo
- Renderer: diff detection for various change scenarios
- Unicode: width calculation (ASCII, CJK, emoji), grapheme iteration

All benchmarks compile and run successfully with criterion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,22 @@ serde_json = "1"
 name = "buffer"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "color"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "text"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "renderer"
+harness = false
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "unicode"
+harness = false
+
 [profile.release]
 opt-level = "z"
 lto = true
